title: Quiz: The Grover Oracle
description: Test your understanding of oracle construction

questions.question: To convert a bit oracle to a phase oracle, the ancilla qubit should be in state:
A phase oracle marking k items has how many -1 entries on its diagonal?
questions.explanation: Each marked item gets a -1 on the diagonal.

questions.question: The phase oracle is always a diagonal matrix.
questions.explanation: Phase oracles only modify phases, not amplitudes between states.
